dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.readyForProject: Ready for your next research project?
dashboard.dragDrop: Drag your PDF document here or click to select a file. Our AI analyzes your academic history in seconds.
dashboard.processingError: Transcript could not be processed. Please try again.
dashboard.processingStill: Processing is still in progress. Please reload later.
dashboard.aiExtracts: The AI extracts your courses and calculates your competency profile.
dashboard.clickToUpload: Click to upload a new transcript.
dashboard.uploadToUnlock: Upload your current Transcript of Records to unlock your detailed competency analysis.
dashboard.radarInfo: The axes are derived from your course names. Upload your transcript to see your personal competency profile.

chat.title: Find Thesis
chat.greeting: Hello! I've analyzed your transcript. You have strong foundations in AI and Statistics. What would you like to learn more about today? I have access to current publications and chair information.
chat.disclaimer: AI can make mistakes. Always verify important information.
chat.researchQuestion: Ask research question… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
chat.stillWorking: Still working on it — your reply will appear here once it's ready.

chairs.title: Chair Explorer
chairs.adminCanCreate: Admins can create chairs from the Admin page.
chairs.browse: Browse all research chairs and open a focused repository dashboard for each chair.

proposals.title: My Proposals
proposals.allProposals: Overview of all available topic proposals
proposals.generateWithAI: Chat with the AI Assistant and ask them to generate proposals for you. They will appear here.
proposals.noMatching: No proposals found for this filter.
